title: storage — metrics
description: OpenTelemetry-compatible metrics emitted via the telemetry module (Stackra\Telemetry\Otel). Every metric is namespaced `stackra.storage.*` and carries tenant_id as a low-cardinality label wherever attributable.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.uploads.started_total
metrics.description: Every upload initiation. protocol = single | tus | s3_multipart.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.uploads.completed_total
metrics.description: outcome = success | quota_exceeded | mime_rejected | size_rejected | virus_found | aborted | expired.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.uploads.duration_ms
metrics.description: Wall-clock upload duration from initiate to available. Chunked uploads measured from initiate to finalize.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.uploads.bytes_total
metrics.description: Total bytes uploaded across all files. Sum-of-histogram companion; used for cost attribution + capacity planning.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.bytes.stored
metrics.description: Observable gauge polled at scrape. Reports the current storage.bytes.consumed usage per tenant (from the SyncStorageEntitlementUsageJob reconciled value, not per-request stale reads).

metrics.name: stackra.storage.files.count
metrics.description: Observable gauge — File row count per (tenant, kind). Sum across kinds = storage.files.max_per_tenant usage.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.dedup.hits_total
metrics.description: How many uploads matched an existing sha256 within the tenant. Measures per-tenant dedup effectiveness.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.dedup.cross_tenant_hits_total
metrics.description: How many uploads matched an existing sha256 in ANOTHER tenant (cross-tenant physical byte sharing). Platform-side capacity signal.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.variants.generated_total
metrics.description: GenerateFileVariantsJob outcomes. outcome = success | failed | skipped_already_exists.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.variants.duration_ms
metrics.description: Variant generation duration. Alerts when P95 > 5s (image processing degradation).

metrics.name: stackra.storage.virus.scans_total
metrics.description: ScanFileForVirusesJob outcomes. outcome = clean | infected | scan_failed. driver = clamav | s3-antivirus | cloudmersive | null.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.virus.scan_duration_ms
metrics.description: AV scan wall-clock duration. Alerts when P95 > 10s.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.virus.quarantined_total
metrics.description: Files moved to quarantine. Security signal — spikes indicate attack traffic.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.signed_urls.issued_total
metrics.description: Signed URL issuance rate. reason = download | preview | share | admin_action | export | notification_attachment.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.signed_urls.hits_total
metrics.description: Redemption hits. Ratio to issued gives redemption effectiveness.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.signed_urls.rejected_total
metrics.description: cause = expired | revoked | ip_lock_mismatch | user_lock_mismatch | one_time_used | signature_invalid.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.signed_urls.active_count
metrics.description: Observable gauge. Rolling count of non-revoked, non-expired signed URLs. Capacity signal — sustained growth indicates missed sweep runs.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.chunked_uploads.in_flight
metrics.description: Observable gauge. Rolling count of ChunkedUpload rows per state (initiating / uploading / finalizing). Alerts when finalizing > 10 (stuck finalisations).

metrics.name: stackra.storage.chunked_uploads.reservation_bytes
metrics.description: Observable gauge. Total bytes RESERVED by in-flight ChunkedUploads (uncommitted). Compare with actual + reservations to detect leaks.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.driver.errors_total
metrics.description: Underlying storage driver errors (S3 4xx/5xx, GCS errors, ClamAV socket errors). operation = put | get | delete | copy | temporaryUrl.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.driver.latency_ms
metrics.description: Underlying driver operation latency. Alerts when S3 put P99 > 5s.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.retention.purged_files_total
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredFilesJob output. Used to reconcile disk cost forecasts.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.retention.freed_bytes_total
metrics.description: Bytes actually freed after refcount decremented to zero. Distinct from purged_files_total when dedup keeps blobs alive across tenants.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.quota.rejections_total
metrics.description: Uploads rejected by storage.quota.enforce middleware. entitlement_key = storage.bytes.consumed | storage.files.max_per_tenant | storage.uploads.month.

metrics.name: stackra.storage.entitlement.fail_open_total
metrics.description: How many uploads sailed through fail-open mode (entitlements.graceful_degradation_mode=on). Emitted only during declared incidents. reason = redis_timeout | redis_unreachable | redis_evicted.
